query: We're white-labeling our embedded analytics for resellers — each reseller wants their own primary color and logo on the dashboards. Theme API or token-level theme override?

Our IQ Chat component looks completely off-brand. Where do I find the available customization options/CSS variables for it?
Want to use our own design system (Tailwind tokens) inside ACK editor components. Is there a theming guide for ACK?
Need to apply a custom font (Inter) across all charts in the dashboard. Does that go in createTheme or per-component?
How do I create a reusable theme that all our dashboards can reference instead of duplicating the JSON?
Per-tenant theme via embed token — each tenant has their own color palette stored in our DB. How do I pass it on createAuthorization?
Built-in theme list — is there a list of every theme ID I can use without creating a custom one?
luzmo-iq-embed-answer's link color clashes with our brand. Which CSS variable controls it?
Why does my Theme API theme not apply to the IQ chat? Same dashboard, same embed.
Standalone Flex viz-item ignores theme="default_dark". How do I theme an individual Luzmo chart?
Multi-tenant SaaS — each tenant must only see their own rows. Pattern 1 vs Pattern 2?
Embed a dashboard in React with LuzmoDashboardComponent and authKey/authToken.
Add a Snowflake connection so my dashboards can query the orders table.
Build a chart builder UI where users drag fields onto a Flex chart and save it. ACK setup.
Python script to delete all dashboards with 'test_' prefix, with confirmation.
IQ Chat returns wrong dataset when users ask about churn. How do I improve accuracy?
Flex chart is invisible — container has height but chart renders 0px.
401 from createAuthorization. Env vars seem set, EU region.
Need to push a 200k-row CSV into Luzmo. How do I batch with createData?
Slot config for a date-range filter linked to a bar chart.
